      "source": [
        "from deep_translator import GoogleTranslator\n",
        "\n",
        "def translate_text():\n",
        "    print(\"Simple Translator (works like Google Translate)\")\n",
        "    print(\"Type 'quit' to exit\\n\")\n",
        "\n",
        "    while True:\n",
        "        text = input(\"Enter text: \").strip()\n",
        "\n",
        "        if text.lower() in {\"quit\", \"exit\"}:\n",
        "            print(\"Goodbye!\")\n",
        "            break\n",
        "\n",
        "        if not text:\n",
        "            print(\"Please enter some text.\\n\")\n",
        "            continue\n",
        "\n",
        "        target_lang = input(\"Enter target language code (en, hi, te, fr, es): \").strip().lower()\n",
        "\n",
        "        if not target_lang:\n",
        "            print(\"Please enter a target language.\\n\")\n",
        "            continue\n",
        "\n",
        "        try:\n",
        "            translated = GoogleTranslator(source='auto', target=target_lang).translate(text)\n",
        "\n",
        "            print(\"\\n--- Translation Result ---\")\n",
        "            print(\"Original:\", text)\n",
        "            print(\"Translated:\", translated)\n",
        "            print()\n",
        "\n",
        "        except Exception as e:\n",
        "            print(f\"\\nError: {e}\\n\")\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "if __name__ == \"__main__\":\n",
        "    translate_text()"

      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "from deep_translator import GoogleTranslator\n",
        "\n",
        "def show_languages():\n",
        "    languages = GoogleTranslator().get_supported_languages(as_dict=True)\n",
        "\n",
        "    print(\"\\nSupported Languages:\\n\")\n",
        "    for name, code in languages.items():\n",
        "        print(f\"{name.capitalize():<25} -> {code}\")\n",
        "\n",
        "    return languages\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "def translate_text():\n",
        "    print(\"Simple Translator\")\n",
        "    print(\"Type 'quit' to exit\\n\")\n",
        "\n",
        "    languages = show_languages()\n",
        "\n",
        "    while True:\n",
        "        text = input(\"\\nEnter text: \").strip()\n",
        "\n",
        "        if text.lower() in {\"quit\", \"exit\"}:\n",
        "            print(\"Goodbye!\")\n",
        "            break\n",
        "\n",
        "        if not text:\n",
        "            print(\"Please enter some text.\")\n",
        "            continue\n",
        "\n",
        "        target_lang = input(\"\\nEnter target language code (see list above): \").strip().lower()\n",
        "\n",
        "        if target_lang not in languages.values():\n",
        "            print(\"Invalid language code. Please choose from the list.\")\n",
        "            continue\n",
        "\n",
        "        try:\n",
        "            translated = GoogleTranslator(source='auto', target=target_lang).translate(text)\n",
        "\n",
        "            print(\"\\n--- Translation Result ---\")\n",
        "            print(\"Original:\", text)\n",
        "            print(\"Translated:\", translated)\n",
        "\n",
        "        except Exception as e:\n",
        "            print(f\"\\nError: {e}\")\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "if __name__ == \"__main__\":\n",
        "    translate_text()"
      ],

    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "#Summarized audio to text"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "pqgfGwHOtuCp"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": []
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "\n",
        "import os\n",
        "import getpass\n",
        "from openai import OpenAI\n",
        "api_key = getpass.getpass(\"Enter your OpenAI API key: \")\n",
        "client = OpenAI(api_key=api_key)\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "def transcribe_audio(file_path: str) -> str:\n",
        "    with open(file_path, \"rb\") as audio_file:\n",
        "        transcript = client.audio.transcriptions.create(\n",
        "            model=\"gpt-4o-transcribe\",\n",
        "            file=audio_file\n",
        "        )\n",
        "    return transcript.text\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "def summarize_text(transcript_text: str) -> str:\n",
        "    prompt = f\"\"\"\n",
        "You are a helpful assistant.\n",
        "Summarize the following audio transcript in clear, simple English.\n",
        "\n",
        "Requirements:\n",
        "1. First give a short paragraph summary.\n",
        "2. Then give 5 bullet points with key ideas.\n",
        "3. Keep it concise and easy to understand.\n",
        "\n",
        "Transcript:\n",
        "{transcript_text}\n",
        "\"\"\"\n",
        "\n",
        "    response = client.responses.create(\n",
        "        model=\"gpt-5.4\",\n",
        "        input=prompt\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    return response.output_text.strip()\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "def main():\n",
        "    print(\"Audio Transcription + Summary App\")\n",
        "    print(\"Type 'quit' to exit.\\n\")\n",
        "\n",
        "    while True:\n",
        "        file_path = input(\"Enter audio file path: \").strip()\n",
        "\n",
        "        if file_path.lower() in {\"quit\", \"exit\"}:\n",
        "            print(\"Goodbye.\")\n",
        "            break\n",
        "\n",
        "        if not file_path:\n",
        "            print(\"Please enter a file path.\\n\")\n",
        "            continue\n",
        "\n",
        "        if not os.path.exists(file_path):\n",
        "            print(\"File not found. Please check the path.\\n\")\n",
        "            continue\n",
        "\n",
        "        try:\n",
        "            print(\"\\nTranscribing audio...\")\n",
        "            transcript_text = transcribe_audio(file_path)\n",
        "\n",
        "            print(\"\\n--- Full Transcript ---\")\n",
        "            print(transcript_text)\n",
        "\n",
        "            print(\"\\nGenerating summary...\")\n",
        "            summary = summarize_text(transcript_text)\n",
        "\n",
        "            print(\"\\n--- Summary ---\")\n",
        "            print(summary)\n",
        "            print()\n",
        "\n",
        "        except Exception as e:\n",
        "            print(f\"\\nError: {e}\\n\")\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "if __name__ == \"__main__\":\n",
        "    main()"
      ],
